title: Enable RLS and add SELECT policy on profiles
description: Enable Row Level Security on the profiles table and add a SELECT policy so authenticated users can only read their own row.
acceptance_criteria: A SELECT policy exists named 'Users can view own profile'
Querying profiles as a different user returns no rows

steps.details: ALTER TABLE public.profiles ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
In Supabase dashboard → Table Editor → profiles → RLS. Confirm RLS is enabled and the policy appears. Test by querying with a user JWT that doesn't match a row — expect 0 results.

technical_notes: No INSERT policy is added here because inserts are handled exclusively by the on_auth_user_created trigger running as SECURITY DEFINER (bypasses RLS).
